task_description: Phase 24: One Identity, One Session, One Wallet, One Permission Model. A user signs in once, every app trusts that session, every cross-app permission is explicit. Covers: unified ABAC+RBAC permission engine, WebAuthn/passkey, TOTP 2FA, phone auth, federated identity, multi-device sessions, unified wallet with Stripe/Razorpay/UPI, Quant Pro subscription with IAP, consent ledger, travel mode, account lifecycle (export/deletion), and Sign-in-with-Quant SDK.

verification.summary: All gates pass: typecheck 82/82, test 84/84, build 60/60, lint 70/70. Semantic review v2 APPROVED. 7 v1 issues all fixed. 3 non-blocking observations remain (empty-context bypass as deliberate design, SDK secret test coverage, purgeable service integration test coverage).
